title: Ship AI compliance acquisition surfaces and due-diligence content
summary: Records release evidence for the new AI-compliance landing page, the compliance-focused generic dashboard comparison page, and the due-diligence blog that ties release history, access controls, and customer usage into enterprise trust review.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new AI-compliance landing page, compliance comparison page, homepage discovery links, and due-diligence blog route all render from the production build and remain in the public release-history pipeline.
Confirms the AI-compliance acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcements and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the AI-compliance landing page, compliance comparison entry, due-diligence blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
